Back to Admin Panel
Wallet Settings
Update the UPI ID, QR code, and other financial settings.

Deposit Methods

Configure how users can add money to their wallets.

Allow users to deposit money automatically via a third-party gateway.

Allow users to deposit by sending you money and a transaction ID.

Manual Payment Details

Update the UPI ID and QR code used for user deposits if manual mode is on.

Transaction & Bonus Settings

Control minimum transaction amounts and referral rewards.

Bonus Configuration

Control how bonus cash is used and earned.

The percentage of an entry fee that can be paid with bonus cash.

Bonus awarded to a user for joining any paid match.
